positive: A mesmerizing illustration of a stylized mythical forest scene at dawn. The central element is a graceful, bioluminescent deer with iridescent antlers, standing amidst oversized, fantastical flora. The flowers and foliage should emit soft, contrasting glows of teal, indigo, and pale lavender, suggesting magic. The forest structure should be symmetrical and highly detailed, featuring intricate root systems that weave across the foreground and background. Use bold, clean linework combined with digitally painted gradients for depth. Composition must be centered and optimized for a square textile print, ensuring strong silhouettes against a slightly gradient, ethereal sky. Cinematic, concept art style, UHD, high contrast, vector-art aesthetic, highly detailed, printed on a deep charcoal canvas.
negative: blur, blurry, low detail, noise, grain, artifacts, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, cropped, jpeg artifacts, ugly, poorly drawn, disfigured
